elements.name: lede-20
elements.text: Citizens enter the process without certainty—and discover mistakes only after an official reviews the file.

elements.name: problem-copy-29
elements.text: Missing fields and conflicts surface late—after time has already been spent submitting or traveling.

elements.name: problem-copy-32
elements.text: Too many repeat questions, too few officers—and citizens make avoidable in-person trips.
